config.script:
#include "50523"
'has_nxm_feature #include "50203"
dim pM60182 : set pM60182 = doc_.getmodule(60182)
function dokhadl_to_ecod(byval pDokHandlId , byval pDokHandlType) select case pDokHandlType case TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ set dokhadl_to_ecod = invoice_to_ecod(pDokHandlId) case TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE set dokhadl_to_ecod = order_to_ecod(pDokHandlId) end select end function
function dokmag_to_ecod(byval pDokMagId, byval pDokMagType, byval strPath): dokmag_to_ecod = "" #ifdef _DENIS if has_nxm_feature("wz_to_edi") then if not nx_.nxm_features.wz_to_edi(trans_.get_this(), pDokMagId, strPath) then dokmag_to_ecod = nx_.nxm_features.last_error_code + " " + nx_.nxm_features.last_error_description end if end if #else dokmag_to_ecod = nx_.features.handel.export.to_edi(trans_.get_this(), pDokMagId, pDokMagType, strPath) #endif end function
function dokhadl_to_edi(byval pDokHandlId , byval pDokHandlType) select case pDokHandlType case TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ set dokhadl_to_edi = invoice_to_edi(pDokHandlId) case TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE set dokhadl_to_edi = order_to_edi(pDokHandlId) end select end function
'srvDate #include "50126"
'currentFirma #include "50203"
private function prepare_invoice_stream_for_ecod() dim stream:set stream = doc_.createstreamobj() ' stream.write "<?xml version=""1.0"" encoding=""windows-1250""?>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<Document-Invoice>" + vbNewLine set prepare_invoice_stream_for_ecod = stream end function
private function finalize_invoice_stream(byref stream) stream.write "</Document-Invoice>" + vbNewLine end function
private function write_invoice_header(byval invoice , byref stream) dim bKorekta : bKorekta = invoice.n5sprzedaz_isKorekta()
stream.write "<Invoice-Header>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<InvoiceNumber>" + format_nr_for_ecod(invoice.strNrDok) + "</InvoiceNumber>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<InvoiceDate>" + format_date_to_ecod(invoice.dDataWyst) + "</InvoiceDate>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<SalesDate>" + format_date_to_ecod(invoice.dDataSprzed) + "</SalesDate>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<InvoiceCurrency>" + invoice.pWaluta.strSkrot + "</InvoiceCurrency>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<InvoicePaymentDueDate>" + format_date_to_ecod(invoice.dDataPlat) + "</InvoicePaymentDueDate>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<InvoicePaymentTerms>" + cstr(invoice.pSposobPlatnosci.nDni) + "</InvoicePaymentTerms>" + vbNewLine dim code if not invoice.pPopSprzed is nothing then code = "C" else code = "9" end if stream.write "<DocumentFunctionCode>" + code + "</DocumentFunctionCode>" + vbNewLine if bKorekta then stream.write "<CorrectionReason>RABAT</CorrectionReason>" + vbNewLine end if
if not invoice.pZamowienie is nothing then #ifdef _DENIS stream.write "<BuyerOrderNumber>" + invoice.pZamowienie.zam_strNrDokObcy + "</BuyerOrderNumber>" + vbNewLine #else stream.write "<BuyerOrderNumber>" + invoice.pZamowienie.strNrDok + "</BuyerOrderNumber>" + vbNewLine #endif stream.write "<BuyerOrderDate>" + format_date_to_ecod(invoice.pZamowienie.dDataWyst) + "</BuyerOrderDate>" + vbNewLine else ' nx_.trace.error "EED001","Brak zamówienia do faktury - dokument może nie być akceptowalny" end if if bKorekta then stream.write "<Reference>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<InvoiceReferenceNumber>"+format_nr_for_ecod(invoice.pPopSprzed.strNrDok)+"</InvoiceReferenceNumber>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<InvoiceReferenceDate>"+format_date_to_ecod(invoice.pPopSprzed.dDataSprzed)+"</InvoiceReferenceDate>" + vbNewLine stream.write "</Reference>" + vbNewLine end if stream.write "</Invoice-Header>" + vbNewLine end function
private function write_invoice_parties(byval invoice , byref stream) stream.write "<Invoice-Parties>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<Buyer>" + vbNewLine dim strBuyerILN strBuyerILN = invoice.pKlient.kli_strILN stream.write "<ILN>" + format_iln_nip_for_ecod(strBuyerILN, EDOC_CODE_KIND_ILN) + "</ILN>" + vbNewLine
dim strBuyerName : strBuyerName = invoice.pKlient.strNazwa stream.write "<BuyerName_1>" + format_itemname_for_ecod(left(strBuyerName,35)) + "</BuyerName_1>" + vbNewLine strBuyerName = mid(strBuyerName,36) if strBuyerName <> "" then stream.write "<BuyerName_2>" + format_itemname_for_ecod(left(strBuyerName,70)) + "</BuyerName_2>" + vbNewLine strBuyerName = mid(strBuyerName,71) if strBuyerName <> "" then stream.write "<BuyerName_3>" + format_itemname_for_ecod(left(strBuyerName,70)) + "</BuyerName_3>" + vbNewLine end if end if
dim strBuyerAddress : strBuyerAddress = invoice.pKlient.strUlica + " " + invoice.pKlient.strNrDomu + "/" + invoice.pKlient.strNrLokalu stream.write "<BuyerAddressLine_1>" + format_itemname_for_ecod(left(strBuyerAddress,30)) + "</BuyerAddressLine_1>" + vbNewLine strBuyerAddress = mid(strBuyerAddress,31) if strBuyerAddress <> "" then stream.write "<BuyerAddressLine_2>" + format_itemname_for_ecod(left(strBuyerAddress,35)) + "</BuyerAddressLine_2>" + vbNewLine strBuyerAddress = mid(strBuyerAddress,36) if strBuyerAddress <> "" then stream.write "<BuyerAddressLine_3>" + format_itemname_for_ecod(left(strBuyerAddress,70)) + "</BuyerAddressLine_3>" + vbNewLine end if end if
'stream.write "<County>" + format_itemname_for_ecod(left(invoice.pKlient.pMiejscowosc.pWojewodztwo.strNazwa,70)) + "</County>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<City>" + format_itemname_for_ecod(left(invoice.pKlient.pMiejscowosc.strNazwa,70)) + "</City>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<PostCode>" + format_itemname_for_ecod(left(invoice.pKlient.strKod,20)) + "</PostCode>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<Country>" + format_itemname_for_ecod(left(invoice.pKlient.pKraj.strNazwa,20)) + "</Country>" + vbNewLine
stream.write "<TaxID>" + format_iln_nip_for_ecod(invoice.pKlient.strNip , EDOC_CODE_KIND_NIP) + "</TaxID>" + vbNewLine stream.write "</Buyer>" + vbNewLine
stream.write "<Seller>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<ILN>" + format_iln_nip_for_ecod(getCurrentFirma().frm_strILN, EDOC_CODE_KIND_ILN) + "</ILN>" + vbNewLine
dim strSellerName : strSellerName = getCurrentFirma().strNazwa stream.write "<SellerName_1>" + format_itemname_for_ecod(left(strSellerName,35)) + "</SellerName_1>" + vbNewLine strSellerName = mid(strSellerName,36) if strSellerName <> "" then stream.write "<SellerName_2>" + format_itemname_for_ecod(left(strSellerName,70)) + "</SellerName_2>" + vbNewLine strSellerName = mid(strSellerName,71) if strSellerName <> "" then stream.write "<SellerName_3>" + format_itemname_for_ecod(left(strSellerName,70)) + "</SellerName_3>" + vbNewLine end if end if
dim strSellerAddress : strSellerAddress = getCurrentFirma().strUlica + " " + getCurrentFirma().strNrDomu + "/" + getCurrentFirma().strNrLokalu stream.write "<SellerAddressLine_1>" + format_itemname_for_ecod(left(strSellerAddress,30)) + "</SellerAddressLine_1>" + vbNewLine strSellerAddress = mid(strSellerAddress,31) if strSellerAddress <> "" then stream.write "<SellerAddressLine_2>" + format_itemname_for_ecod(left(strSellerAddress,35)) + "</SellerAddressLine_2>" + vbNewLine strSellerAddress = mid(strSellerAddress,36) if strSellerAddress <> "" then stream.write "<SellerAddressLine_3>" + format_itemname_for_ecod(left(strSellerAddress,70)) + "</SellerAddressLine_3>" + vbNewLine end if end if
'stream.write "<County>" + format_itemname_for_ecod(left(getCurrentFirma().pMiejscowosc.pWojewodztwo.strNazwa,70)) + "</County>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<City>" + format_itemname_for_ecod(left(getCurrentFirma().pMiejscowosc.strNazwa,70)) + "</City>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<PostCode>" + format_itemname_for_ecod(left(getCurrentFirma().strKod,20)) + "</PostCode>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<Country>" + format_itemname_for_ecod(left(getCurrentFirma().pKraj.strNazwa,20)) + "</Country>" + vbNewLine
dim strNIP: strNIP = getCurrentFirma().strNip #ifdef _DENIS stream.write "<TaxID>" + format_iln_nip_for_ecod("PL" + strNIP , EDOC_CODE_KIND_NIP) + "</TaxID>" + vbNewLine #else stream.write "<TaxID>" + format_iln_nip_for_ecod(strNIP , EDOC_CODE_KIND_NIP) + "</TaxID>" + vbNewLine #endif stream.write "<CodeByBuyer>" + format_itemname_for_ecod(invoice.pKlient.kli_strIndeksNaszaFirma) + "</CodeByBuyer>" + vbNewLine stream.write "</Seller>" + vbNewLine
stream.write "<Payee>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<ILN>" + format_iln_nip_for_ecod(getCurrentFirma().frm_strILN, EDOC_CODE_KIND_ILN) + "</ILN>" + vbNewLine
dim strPayeeName : strPayeeName = getCurrentFirma().strNazwa stream.write "<PayeeName_1>" + format_itemname_for_ecod(left(strPayeeName,35)) + "</PayeeName_1>" + vbNewLine strPayeeName = mid(strPayeeName,36) if strPayeeName <> "" then stream.write "<PayeeName_2>" + format_itemname_for_ecod(left(strPayeeName,70)) + "</PayeeName_2>" + vbNewLine strPayeeName = mid(strPayeeName,71) if strPayeeName <> "" then stream.write "<PayeeName_3>" + format_itemname_for_ecod(left(strPayeeName,70)) + "</PayeeName_3>" + vbNewLine end if end if
dim strPayeeAddress : strPayeeAddress = getCurrentFirma().strUlica + " " + getCurrentFirma().strNrDomu + "/" + getCurrentFirma().strNrLokalu stream.write "<PayeeAddressLine_1>" + format_itemname_for_ecod(left(strPayeeAddress,30)) + "</PayeeAddressLine_1>" + vbNewLine strPayeeAddress = mid(strPayeeAddress,31) if strPayeeAddress <> "" then stream.write "<PayeeAddressLine_2>" + format_itemname_for_ecod(left(strPayeeAddress,35)) + "</PayeeAddressLine_2>" + vbNewLine strPayeeAddress = mid(strPayeeAddress,36) if strPayeeAddress <> "" then stream.write "<PayeeAddressLine_3>" + format_itemname_for_ecod(left(strPayeeAddress,70)) + "</PayeeAddressLine_3>" + vbNewLine end if end if
'stream.write "<County>" + format_itemname_for_ecod(left(getCurrentFirma().pMiejscowosc.pWojewodztwo.strNazwa,70)) + "</County>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<City>" + format_itemname_for_ecod(left(getCurrentFirma().pMiejscowosc.strNazwa,70)) + "</City>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<PostCode>" + format_itemname_for_ecod(left(getCurrentFirma().strKod,20)) + "</PostCode>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<Country>" + format_itemname_for_ecod(left(getCurrentFirma().pKraj.strNazwa,20)) + "</Country>" + vbNewLine
stream.write "<AccountNumber>" + format_account_for_ecod(getCurrentFirma().strRachunek1) + "</AccountNumber>" + vbNewLine stream.write "</Payee>" + vbNewLine
stream.write "<DeliveryDetail>" + vbNewLine dim strILN_JO : strILN_JO = invoice.pKlient.kli_strILN
if not invoice.pKlient_JO is nothing then strILN_JO = invoice.pKlient_JO.kjo_strILN end if
stream.write "<DeliveryLocationNumber>" + _ format_iln_nip_for_ecod(strILN_JO , EDOC_CODE_KIND_ILN) + "</DeliveryLocationNumber>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<DeliveryDate>" + format_date_to_ecod(invoice.dDataWyst) + "</DeliveryDate>" + vbNewLine
dim strDeliveryDespatchNumber : strDeliveryDespatchNumber = "" dim strSQL strSQL = "select strNrDok from n5dokmag where " +_ " pRejestrDok in (select idobj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp=N5REJESTRDOK__WZ) and " +_ " wrefDokHandl_wrt=TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ and wrefDokHandl = " + cstr(invoice.idobj) dim oRecordset set oRecordset = trans_.createadors(strSQL) if oRecordset.recordCount = 0 then if not invoice.pZamowienie is nothing then strSQL = "select strNrDok from n5dokmag where " +_ " pRejestrDok in (select idobj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp=N5REJESTRDOK__WZ) and " +_ " wrefDokHandl_wrt = TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE and wrefDokHandl = " + cstr(invoice.pZamowienie.idobj) set oRecordset = trans_.createadors(strSQL) end if end if
if not oRecordset.EOF then strDeliveryDespatchNumber = CStr(oRecordset("strNrDok").value) end if
stream.write "<DespatchNumber>" + strDeliveryDespatchNumber + "</DespatchNumber>" + vbNewLine stream.write "</DeliveryDetail>" + vbNewLine
stream.write "</Invoice-Parties>" + vbNewLine end function
private function write_invoice_line(byref invoice,byval invoice_position , byval iter , byref stream) dim bKorekta : bKorekta = invoice.n5sprzedaz_isKorekta()
dim oPozKorekty if bKorekta then set oPozKorekty = invoice.pPopSprzed.listPozycje.get(iter) end if
stream.write "<Line>" + vbNewLine
stream.write "<Line-Item>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<LineNumber>" + cstr(iter) + "</LineNumber>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<EAN>" + format_ean_for_ecod(invoice_position.pOpak.strEAN) + "</EAN>" + vbNewLine
stream.write "<BuyerPartNumber>" +_ + pM60182.IndeksProduktu(invoice_position.pProdukt,invoice.pKlient) + "</BuyerPartNumber>" + vbNewLine #ifdef _METROX stream.write "<SupplierItemCode>" + invoice_position.pProdukt.strIndeks + "</SupplierItemCode>" + vbNewLine #endif dim strProdName: strProdName = invoice_position.pProdukt.strNazwa #ifdef _DENIS 'pobierz nazwę z info. dla klienta strProdName = doc_.getmodule(60182).NazwaProduktu(invoice_position.pProdukt,invoice.pKlient) stream.write "<ItemDescription>" + format_itemname_for_ecod(strProdName) + "</ItemDescription>" + vbNewLine #else stream.write "<ItemDescription>" + format_itemname_for_ecod(strProdName) + "</ItemDescription>" + vbNewLine #endif stream.write "<ItemType>CU</ItemType>" + vbNewLine
stream.write "<InvoiceQuantity>" + format_qty_for_ecod(invoice_position.curIloscOpak) + "</InvoiceQuantity>" + vbNewLine if bKorekta then stream.write "<PreviousInvoiceQuantity>"+format_qty_for_ecod(oPozKorekty.curIloscOpak)+"</PreviousInvoiceQuantity>"+ vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionInvoiceQuantity>"+format_qty_for_ecod(invoice_position.curIloscOpak - oPozKorekty.curIloscOpak)+"</CorrectionInvoiceQuantity>"+ vbNewLine stream.write "<QuantityPerUnit>"+format_qty_for_ecod(1.00)+"</QuantityPerUnit>"+ vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionReason>RABAT</CorrectionReason>"+ vbNewLine end if stream.write "<UOMCoded>PCE</UOMCoded>" + vbNewLine
dim bIsWalObca: bIsWalObca = (invoice.pWaluta.strSkrot <> "PLN") if bIsWalObca then stream.write "<InvoiceUnitNetPrice>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice_position.curCenaNettoWal) + "</InvoiceUnitNetPrice>" + vbNewLine else stream.write "<InvoiceUnitNetPrice>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice_position.curCenaNetto) + "</InvoiceUnitNetPrice>" + vbNewLine end if if bKorekta then if bIsWalObca then stream.write "<PreviousInvoiceUnitNetPrice>" + format_price_for_ecod(oPozKorekty.curCenaNettoWal) + "</PreviousInvoiceUnitNetPrice>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionInvoiceUnitNetPrice>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice_position.curCenaNettoWal - oPozKorekty.curCenaNettoWal) + "</CorrectionInvoiceUnitNetPrice>" + vbNewLine else stream.write "<PreviousInvoiceUnitNetPrice>" + format_price_for_ecod(oPozKorekty.curCenaNetto) + "</PreviousInvoiceUnitNetPrice>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionInvoiceUnitNetPrice>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice_position.curCenaNetto - oPozKorekty.curCenaNetto) + "</CorrectionInvoiceUnitNetPrice>" + vbNewLine end if end if stream.write "<TaxRate>" + format_taxrate_for_ecod(invoice_position.eVat) + "</TaxRate>" + vbNewLine if bKorekta then stream.write "<PreviousTaxRate>" + format_taxrate_for_ecod(oPozKorekty.eVat) + "</PreviousTaxRate>" + vbNewLine end if stream.write "<TaxCategoryCode>" + format_taxcatcode_for_ecod(invoice_position.eVat) + "</TaxCategoryCode>" + vbNewLine if bKorekta then stream.write "<PreviousTaxCategoryCode>" + format_taxcatcode_for_ecod(oPozKorekty.eVat) + "</PreviousTaxCategoryCode>" + vbNewLine end if stream.write "<TaxReference>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<ReferenceType>" + format_taxreftype_for_ecod(invoice_position) + "</ReferenceType>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<ReferenceNumber>" + format_taxrefnum_for_ecod(invoice_position) + "</ReferenceNumber>" + vbNewLine stream.write "</TaxReference>" + vbNewLine
stream.write "<TaxAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice_position.curVat) + "</TaxAmount>" + vbNewLine if bKorekta then stream.write "<PreviousTaxAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(oPozKorekty.curVat) + "</PreviousTaxAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionTaxAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice_position.curVat - oPozKorekty.curVat) + "</CorrectionTaxAmount>" + vbNewLine end if if bIsWalObca then stream.write "<NetAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice_position.curWartWal) + "</NetAmount>" + vbNewLine else stream.write "<NetAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice_position.curWartNetto) + "</NetAmount>" + vbNewLine end if if bKorekta then if bIsWalObca then stream.write "<PreviousNetAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(oPozKorekty.curWartWal) + "</PreviousNetAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionNetAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice_position.curWartWal - oPozKorekty.curWartWal) + "</CorrectionNetAmount>" + vbNewLine else stream.write "<PreviousNetAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(oPozKorekty.curWartNetto) + "</PreviousNetAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionNetAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice_position.curWartNetto - oPozKorekty.curWartNetto) + "</CorrectionNetAmount>" + vbNewLine end if end if stream.write "</Line-Item>" + vbNewLine
stream.write "</Line>" + vbNewLine end function
private function write_invoice_lines(byval invoice , byref stream) stream.write "<Invoice-Lines>" + vbNewLine dim invoice_position dim iter:iter = 1 for each invoice_position in invoice.listPozycje write_invoice_line invoice,invoice_position , iter , stream iter = iter + 1 next stream.write "</Invoice-Lines>" + vbNewLine end function
private function write_invoice_summary(byval invoice , byref stream) dim bKorekta : bKorekta = invoice.n5sprzedaz_isKorekta() dim bIsWalObca: bIsWalObca = (invoice.pWaluta.strSkrot <> "PLN")
stream.write "<Invoice-Summary>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TotalLines>" + cstr(invoice.listPozycje.count) + "</TotalLines>" + vbNewLine if bIsWalObca then stream.write "<TotalNetAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curSumaWal) + "</TotalNetAmount>" + vbNewLine else stream.write "<TotalNetAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curSumaNetto) + "</TotalNetAmount>" + vbNewLine end if if bKorekta then if bIsWalObca then stream.write "<PreviousTotalNetAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.pPopSprzed.curSumaWal) + "</PreviousTotalNetAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionTotalNetAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curSumaWal - invoice.pPopSprzed.curSumaWal) + "</CorrectionTotalNetAmount>" + vbNewLine else stream.write "<PreviousTotalNetAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.pPopSprzed.curSumaNetto) + "</PreviousTotalNetAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionTotalNetAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curSumaNetto - invoice.pPopSprzed.curSumaNetto) + "</CorrectionTotalNetAmount>" + vbNewLine end if
stream.write "<TotalTaxableBasis>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curSumaNetto) + "</TotalTaxableBasis>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<PreviousTotalTaxableBasis>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.pPopSprzed.curSumaNetto) + "</PreviousTotalTaxableBasis>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionTotalTaxableBasis>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curSumaNetto - invoice.pPopSprzed.curSumaNetto) + "</CorrectionTotalTaxableBasis>" + vbNewLine end if stream.write "<TotalTaxAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curSumaVAT) + "</TotalTaxAmount>" + vbNewLine if bKorekta then stream.write "<PreviousTotalTaxAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.pPopSprzed.curSumaVAT) + "</PreviousTotalTaxAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionTotalTaxAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curSumaVAT - invoice.pPopSprzed.curSumaVAT) + "</CorrectionTotalTaxAmount>" + vbNewLine end if if bIsWalObca then stream.write "<TotalGrossAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curSumaWalBrutto) + "</TotalGrossAmount>" + vbNewLine else stream.write "<TotalGrossAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curSumaBrutto) + "</TotalGrossAmount>" + vbNewLine end if if bKorekta then if bIsWalObca then stream.write "<PreviousTotalGrossAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.pPopSprzed.curSumaWalBrutto) + "</PreviousTotalGrossAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionTotalGrossAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curSumaWalBrutto - invoice.pPopSprzed.curSumaWalBrutto) + "</CorrectionTotalGrossAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TotalGrossAmountFreeText>" + doc_.afc.display.slownie(invoice.curSumaWalBrutto) + "</TotalGrossAmountFreeText>" + vbNewLine else stream.write "<PreviousTotalGrossAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.pPopSprzed.curSumaBrutto) + "</PreviousTotalGrossAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionTotalGrossAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curSumaBrutto - invoice.pPopSprzed.curSumaBrutto) + "</CorrectionTotalGrossAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TotalGrossAmountFreeText>" + doc_.afc.display.slownie(invoice.curSumaBrutto) + "</TotalGrossAmountFreeText>" + vbNewLine end if end if stream.write "<Tax-Summary>" + vbNewLine
if invoice.curNetto0 <> ccur(0) then stream.write "<Tax-Summary-Line>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TaxRate>" + format_taxrate_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_0) + "</TaxRate>" + vbNewLine if bKorekta then stream.write "<PreviousTaxRate>" + format_taxrate_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_0) + "</PreviousTaxRate>" + vbNewLine end if stream.write "<TaxCategoryCode>" + format_taxcatcode_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_0) + "</TaxCategoryCode>" + vbNewLine if bKorekta then stream.write "<PreviousTaxCategoryCode>" + format_taxcatcode_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_0) + "</PreviousTaxCategoryCode>" + vbNewLine end if stream.write "<TaxAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(ccur(0)) + "</TaxAmount>" + vbNewLine if bKorekta then stream.write "<PreviousTaxAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(ccur(0)) + "</PreviousTaxAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionTaxAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(ccur(0)) + "</CorrectionTaxAmount>" + vbNewLine end if if bIsWalObca then stream.write "<TaxableAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curSumaWal) + "</TaxableAmount>" + vbNewLine else stream.write "<TaxableAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curNetto0) + "</TaxableAmount>" + vbNewLine end if if bKorekta then if bIsWalObca then stream.write "<PreviousTaxableAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.pPopSprzed.curSumaWal) + "</PreviousTaxableAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionTaxableAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curSumaWal - invoice.pPopSprzed.curSumaWal) + "</CorrectionTaxableAmount>" + vbNewLine else stream.write "<PreviousTaxableAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.pPopSprzed.curNetto0) + "</PreviousTaxableAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionTaxableAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curNetto0 - invoice.pPopSprzed.curNetto0) + "</CorrectionTaxableAmount>" + vbNewLine end if stream.write "<TotalTaxableBasis>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curNetto0) + "</TotalTaxableBasis>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<PreviousTotalTaxableBasis>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.pPopSprzed.curNetto0) + "</PreviousTotalTaxableBasis>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionTotalTaxableBasis>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curNetto0 - invoice.pPopSprzed.curNetto0) + "</CorrectionTotalTaxableBasis>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<SubtotalAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curNetto0) + "</SubtotalAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<PreviousSubtotalAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.pPopSprzed.curNetto0) + "</PreviousSubtotalAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionSubtotalAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curNetto0 - invoice.pPopSprzed.curNetto0) + "</CorrectionSubtotalAmount>" + vbNewLine end if stream.write "</Tax-Summary-Line>" + vbNewLine end if
if invoice.curNettoZw <> ccur(0) then stream.write "<Tax-Summary-Line>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TaxRate>" + format_taxrate_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_ZWOLNIONY) + "</TaxRate>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TaxCategoryCode>" + format_taxcatcode_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_ZWOLNIONY) + "</TaxCategoryCode>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TaxAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(ccur(0)) + "</TaxAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TaxableAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curNettoZw) + "</TaxableAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "</Tax-Summary-Line>" + vbNewLine end if
if invoice.curNettoNp <> ccur(0) then stream.write "<Tax-Summary-Line>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TaxRate>" + format_taxrate_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_NIE_PODLEGA) + "</TaxRate>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TaxCategoryCode>" + format_taxcatcode_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_NIE_PODLEGA) + "</TaxCategoryCode>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TaxAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(ccur(0)) + "</TaxAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TaxableAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curNettoNp) + "</TaxableAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "</Tax-Summary-Line>" + vbNewLine end if
if invoice.curNetto2 <> ccur(0) then stream.write "<Tax-Summary-Line>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TaxRate>" + format_taxrate_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_2) + "</TaxRate>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TaxCategoryCode>" + format_taxcatcode_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_2) + "</TaxCategoryCode>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TaxAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curVat2) + "</TaxAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TaxableAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curNetto2) + "</TaxableAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "</Tax-Summary-Line>" + vbNewLine end if
if invoice.curNetto3 <> ccur(0) then stream.write "<Tax-Summary-Line>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TaxRate>" + format_taxrate_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_3) + "</TaxRate>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TaxCategoryCode>" + format_taxcatcode_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_3) + "</TaxCategoryCode>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TaxAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curVat3) + "</TaxAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TaxableAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curNetto3) + "</TaxableAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "</Tax-Summary-Line>" + vbNewLine end if
if invoice.curNetto4 <> ccur(0) then stream.write "<Tax-Summary-Line>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TaxRate>" + format_taxrate_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_4) + "</TaxRate>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TaxCategoryCode>" + format_taxcatcode_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_4) + "</TaxCategoryCode>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TaxAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curVat4) + "</TaxAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TaxableAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curNetto4) + "</TaxableAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "</Tax-Summary-Line>" + vbNewLine end if
if invoice.curNetto7 <> ccur(0) then stream.write "<Tax-Summary-Line>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TaxRate>" + format_taxrate_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_7) + "</TaxRate>" + vbNewLine if bKorekta then stream.write "<PreviousTaxRate>" + format_taxrate_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_7) + "</PreviousTaxRate>" + vbNewLine end if stream.write "<TaxCategoryCode>" + format_taxcatcode_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_7) + "</TaxCategoryCode>" + vbNewLine if bKorekta then stream.write "<PreviousTaxCategoryCode>" + format_taxcatcode_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_7) + "</PreviousTaxCategoryCode>" + vbNewLine end if stream.write "<TaxAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curVat7) + "</TaxAmount>" + vbNewLine if bKorekta then stream.write "<PreviousTaxAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.pPopSprzed.curVat7) + "</PreviousTaxAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionTaxAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curVat7 - invoice.pPopSprzed.curVat7) + "</CorrectionTaxAmount>" + vbNewLine end if stream.write "<TaxableAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curNetto7) + "</TaxableAmount>" + vbNewLine if bKorekta then stream.write "<PreviousTaxableAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.pPopSprzed.curNetto7) + "</PreviousTaxableAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionTaxableAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curNetto7 - invoice.pPopSprzed.curNetto7) + "</CorrectionTaxableAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TotalTaxableBasis>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curNetto7) + "</TotalTaxableBasis>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<PreviousTotalTaxableBasis>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.pPopSprzed.curNetto7) + "</PreviousTotalTaxableBasis>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionTotalTaxableBasis>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curNetto7 - invoice.pPopSprzed.curNetto7) + "</CorrectionTotalTaxableBasis>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<SubtotalAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curBrutto7) + "</SubtotalAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<PreviousSubtotalAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.pPopSprzed.curBrutto7) + "</PreviousSubtotalAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionSubtotalAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curBrutto7 - invoice.pPopSprzed.curBrutto7) + "</CorrectionSubtotalAmount>" + vbNewLine end if stream.write "</Tax-Summary-Line>" + vbNewLine end if
if invoice.curNetto12 <> ccur(0) then stream.write "<Tax-Summary-Line>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TaxRate>" + format_taxrate_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_12) + "</TaxRate>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TaxCategoryCode>" + format_taxcatcode_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_12) + "</TaxCategoryCode>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TaxAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curVat12) + "</TaxAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TaxableAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curNetto12) + "</TaxableAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "</Tax-Summary-Line>" + vbNewLine end if
if invoice.curNetto17 <> ccur(0) then stream.write "<Tax-Summary-Line>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TaxRate>" + format_taxrate_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_17) + "</TaxRate>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TaxCategoryCode>" + format_taxcatcode_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_17) + "</TaxCategoryCode>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TaxAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curVat17) + "</TaxAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TaxableAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curNetto17) + "</TaxableAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "</Tax-Summary-Line>" + vbNewLine end if
if invoice.curNetto22 <> ccur(0) then stream.write "<Tax-Summary-Line>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TaxRate>" + format_taxrate_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_22) + "</TaxRate>" + vbNewLine if bKorekta then stream.write "<PreviousTaxRate>" + format_taxrate_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_22) + "</PreviousTaxRate>" + vbNewLine end if stream.write "<TaxCategoryCode>" + format_taxcatcode_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_22) + "</TaxCategoryCode>" + vbNewLine if bKorekta then stream.write "<PreviousTaxCategoryCode>" + format_taxcatcode_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_22) + "</PreviousTaxCategoryCode>" + vbNewLine end if stream.write "<TaxAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curVat22) + "</TaxAmount>" + vbNewLine if bKorekta then stream.write "<PreviousTaxAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.pPopSprzed.curVat22) + "</PreviousTaxAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionTaxAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curVat22 - invoice.pPopSprzed.curVat22) + "</CorrectionTaxAmount>" + vbNewLine end if stream.write "<TaxableAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curNetto22) + "</TaxableAmount>" + vbNewLine if bKorekta then stream.write "<PreviousTaxableAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.pPopSprzed.curNetto22) + "</PreviousTaxableAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionTaxableAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curNetto22 - invoice.pPopSprzed.curNetto22) + "</CorrectionTaxableAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TotalTaxableBasis>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curNetto22) + "</TotalTaxableBasis>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<PreviousTotalTaxableBasis>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.pPopSprzed.curNetto22) + "</PreviousTotalTaxableBasis>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionTotalTaxableBasis>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curNetto22 - invoice.pPopSprzed.curNetto22) + "</CorrectionTotalTaxableBasis>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<SubtotalAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curBrutto22) + "</SubtotalAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<PreviousSubtotalAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.pPopSprzed.curBrutto22) + "</PreviousSubtotalAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionSubtotalAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curBrutto22 - invoice.pPopSprzed.curBrutto22) + "</CorrectionSubtotalAmount>" + vbNewLine end if stream.write "</Tax-Summary-Line>" + vbNewLine end if
if invoice.curNetto5 <> ccur(0) then stream.write "<Tax-Summary-Line>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TaxRate>" + format_taxrate_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_5) + "</TaxRate>" + vbNewLine if bKorekta then stream.write "<PreviousTaxRate>" + format_taxrate_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_5) + "</PreviousTaxRate>" + vbNewLine end if stream.write "<TaxCategoryCode>" + format_taxcatcode_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_5) + "</TaxCategoryCode>" + vbNewLine if bKorekta then stream.write "<PreviousTaxCategoryCode>" + format_taxcatcode_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_5) + "</PreviousTaxCategoryCode>" + vbNewLine end if stream.write "<TaxAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curVat5) + "</TaxAmount>" + vbNewLine if bKorekta then stream.write "<PreviousTaxAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.pPopSprzed.curVat5) + "</PreviousTaxAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionTaxAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curVat5 - invoice.pPopSprzed.curVat5) + "</CorrectionTaxAmount>" + vbNewLine end if stream.write "<TaxableAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curNetto5) + "</TaxableAmount>" + vbNewLine if bKorekta then stream.write "<PreviousTaxableAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.pPopSprzed.curNetto5) + "</PreviousTaxableAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionTaxableAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curNetto5 - invoice.pPopSprzed.curNetto5) + "</CorrectionTaxableAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TotalTaxableBasis>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curNetto5) + "</TotalTaxableBasis>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<PreviousTotalTaxableBasis>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.pPopSprzed.curNetto5) + "</PreviousTotalTaxableBasis>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionTotalTaxableBasis>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curNetto5 - invoice.pPopSprzed.curNetto5) + "</CorrectionTotalTaxableBasis>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<SubtotalAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curBrutto5) + "</SubtotalAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<PreviousSubtotalAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.pPopSprzed.curBrutto5) + "</PreviousSubtotalAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionSubtotalAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curBrutto5 - invoice.pPopSprzed.curBrutto5) + "</CorrectionSubtotalAmount>" + vbNewLine end if stream.write "</Tax-Summary-Line>" + vbNewLine end if
if invoice.curNetto8 <> ccur(0) then stream.write "<Tax-Summary-Line>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TaxRate>" + format_taxrate_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_8) + "</TaxRate>" + vbNewLine if bKorekta then stream.write "<PreviousTaxRate>" + format_taxrate_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_8) + "</PreviousTaxRate>" + vbNewLine end if stream.write "<TaxCategoryCode>" + format_taxcatcode_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_8) + "</TaxCategoryCode>" + vbNewLine if bKorekta then stream.write "<PreviousTaxCategoryCode>" + format_taxcatcode_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_8) + "</PreviousTaxCategoryCode>" + vbNewLine end if stream.write "<TaxAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curVat8) + "</TaxAmount>" + vbNewLine if bKorekta then stream.write "<PreviousTaxAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.pPopSprzed.curVat8) + "</PreviousTaxAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionTaxAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curVat8 - invoice.pPopSprzed.curVat8) + "</CorrectionTaxAmount>" + vbNewLine end if stream.write "<TaxableAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curNetto8) + "</TaxableAmount>" + vbNewLine if bKorekta then stream.write "<PreviousTaxableAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.pPopSprzed.curNetto8) + "</PreviousTaxableAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionTaxableAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curNetto8 - invoice.pPopSprzed.curNetto8) + "</CorrectionTaxableAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TotalTaxableBasis>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curNetto8) + "</TotalTaxableBasis>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<PreviousTotalTaxableBasis>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.pPopSprzed.curNetto8) + "</PreviousTotalTaxableBasis>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionTotalTaxableBasis>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curNetto8 - invoice.pPopSprzed.curNetto8) + "</CorrectionTotalTaxableBasis>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<SubtotalAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curBrutto8) + "</SubtotalAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<PreviousSubtotalAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.pPopSprzed.curBrutto8) + "</PreviousSubtotalAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionSubtotalAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curBrutto8 - invoice.pPopSprzed.curBrutto8) + "</CorrectionSubtotalAmount>" + vbNewLine end if stream.write "</Tax-Summary-Line>" + vbNewLine end if
if invoice.curNetto23 <> ccur(0) then stream.write "<Tax-Summary-Line>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TaxRate>" + format_taxrate_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_23) + "</TaxRate>" + vbNewLine if bKorekta then stream.write "<PreviousTaxRate>" + format_taxrate_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_23) + "</PreviousTaxRate>" + vbNewLine end if stream.write "<TaxCategoryCode>" + format_taxcatcode_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_23) + "</TaxCategoryCode>" + vbNewLine if bKorekta then stream.write "<PreviousTaxCategoryCode>" + format_taxcatcode_for_ecod(STAWKA_VAT_23) + "</PreviousTaxCategoryCode>" + vbNewLine end if stream.write "<TaxAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curVat23) + "</TaxAmount>" + vbNewLine if bKorekta then stream.write "<PreviousTaxAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.pPopSprzed.curVat23) + "</PreviousTaxAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionTaxAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curVat23 - invoice.pPopSprzed.curVat23) + "</CorrectionTaxAmount>" + vbNewLine end if stream.write "<TaxableAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curNetto23) + "</TaxableAmount>" + vbNewLine if bKorekta then stream.write "<PreviousTaxableAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.pPopSprzed.curNetto23) + "</PreviousTaxableAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionTaxableAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curNetto23 - invoice.pPopSprzed.curNetto23) + "</CorrectionTaxableAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TotalTaxableBasis>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curNetto23) + "</TotalTaxableBasis>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<PreviousTotalTaxableBasis>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.pPopSprzed.curNetto23) + "</PreviousTotalTaxableBasis>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionTotalTaxableBasis>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curNetto23 - invoice.pPopSprzed.curNetto23) + "</CorrectionTotalTaxableBasis>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<SubtotalAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curBrutto23) + "</SubtotalAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<PreviousSubtotalAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.pPopSprzed.curBrutto23) + "</PreviousSubtotalAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<CorrectionSubtotalAmount>" + format_price_for_ecod(invoice.curBrutto23 - invoice.pPopSprzed.curBrutto23) + "</CorrectionSubtotalAmount>" + vbNewLine end if stream.write "</Tax-Summary-Line>" + vbNewLine end if
stream.write "</Tax-Summary>" + vbNewLine stream.write "</Invoice-Summary>" + vbNewLine end function
function invoice_to_ecod(byval idobj_invoice) dim invoice:set invoice = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ , idobj_invoice) dim stream set stream = prepare_invoice_stream_for_ecod() write_invoice_header invoice , stream write_invoice_parties invoice , stream write_invoice_lines invoice , stream write_invoice_summary invoice , stream finalize_invoice_stream stream set invoice_to_ecod = stream end function
'*************************************************************
function prepare_order_stream_for_ecod() dim stream:set stream = doc_.createstreamobj() stream.write "<?xml version=""1.0"" encoding=""windows-1250""?>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<Document-Order>" + vbNewLine set prepare_order_stream_for_ecod = stream end function
function finalize_order_stream(byref stream) stream.write "</Document-Order>" + vbNewLine end function
function order_to_ecod(byval idOrder) dim order:set order = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE , idorder) dim stream set stream = prepare_order_stream_for_ecod() write_order_header order , stream write_order_parties order , stream write_order_lines order , stream write_order_summary order , stream finalize_order_stream stream set order_to_ecod = stream end function
function order_to_edi(byval idOrder) dim order:set order = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE , idorder) dim stream set stream = prepare_order_stream_for_ecod() write_order_header order , stream write_order_parties order , stream write_order_lines order , stream write_order_summary order , stream finalize_order_stream stream set order_to_edi = stream end function
private function write_order_header(byval order , byref stream) stream.write "<Order-Header>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<OrderNumber>" + format_nr_for_ecod(order.strNrDok) + "</OrderNumber>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<OrderDate>" + format_date_to_ecod(Order.dDataWyst) + "</OrderDate>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<ExpectedDeliveryDate>" + format_date_to_ecod(Order.dDataReal) + "</ExpectedDeliveryDate>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<ExpectedDeliveryTime></ExpectedDeliveryTime>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<PromotionReference></PromotionReference>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<DocumentFunctionCode>O</DocumentFunctionCode>" + vbNewLine stream.write "</Order-Header>" + vbNewLine end function
private function write_order_parties(byval order , byref stream) stream.write "<Order-Parties>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<Buyer>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<ILN>" + format_iln_nip_for_ecod(order.pKlient.kli_strILN , EDOC_CODE_KIND_ILN) + "</ILN>" + vbNewLine stream.write "</Buyer>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<Seller>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<ILN>" + format_iln_nip_for_ecod(getCurrentFirma().frm_strILN , EDOC_CODE_KIND_ILN) + "</ILN>" + vbNewLine stream.write "</Seller>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<DeliverPoint>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<ILN>" + format_iln_nip_for_ecod(order.pKlient.kli_strILN , EDOC_CODE_KIND_ILN) + "</ILN>" + vbNewLine stream.write "</DeliverPoint>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<ShipFrom>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<ILN>" + format_iln_nip_for_ecod(getCurrentFirma().frm_strILN , EDOC_CODE_KIND_ILN) + "</ILN>" + vbNewLine stream.write "</ShipFrom>" + vbNewLine stream.write "</Order-Parties>" + vbNewLine end function
private function write_order_lines(byval order , byref stream) stream.write "<Order-Lines>" + vbNewLine dim order_position dim iter:iter = 1 for each order_position in order.listPozycje write_order_line order_position , iter , stream iter = iter + 1 next stream.write "</Order-Lines>" + vbNewLine end function
private function write_order_line (byval order_position , byval iter , byref stream) stream.write "<Line>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<Line-Item>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<LineNumber>" + cstr(iter) + "</LineNumber>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<EAN>" + format_ean_for_ecod(order_position.pOpak.strEAN) + "</EAN>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<BuyerItemCode>" + format_itemcode_for_ecod(order_position.pOpak.strKodOpak) + "</BuyerItemCode>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<SupplierItemCode>" + format_itemcode_for_ecod(order_position.pOpak.strKodOpak) + "</SupplierItemCode>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<ItemDescription>" + format_itemname_for_ecod(order_position.pProdukt.strNazwa) + "</ItemDescription>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<ItemType>CU</ItemType>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<OrderedQuantity>" + format_qty_for_ecod(order_position.curIloscOpak) + "</OrderedQuantity>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<OrderedUnitPacksize>" + format_qty_for_ecod(order_position.pOpak.currKrotnosc) + "</OrderedUnitPacksize>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<UnitOfMeasure>" + format_uofm_for_ecod(order_position.pOpak.pJednOpak) + "</UnitOfMeasure>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<OrderedUnitNetPrice>" + format_price_for_ecod(order_position.curCenaNetto) + "</OrderedUnitNetPrice>" + vbNewLine stream.write "</Line-Item>" + vbNewLine stream.write "</Line>" + vbNewLine end function
private function write_order_summary(byval order , byref stream) stream.write "<Order-Summary>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TotalLines>" + cstr(order.listPozycje.count) + "</TotalLines>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TotalOrderedAmount>" + format_qty_for_ecod(0) + "</TotalOrderedAmount>" + vbNewLine stream.write "</Order-Summary>" + vbNewLine end function
'************************************************************* ' tools
private function format_date_to_ecod(byval dDate) dim strYear:strYear = cstr(year(dDate))
dim strMonth:strMonth = cstr(month(dDate)) if len(strMonth) = 1 then strMonth = "0" + strMonth end if
dim strDay:strDay = cstr(day(dDate)) if len(strDay) = 1 then strDay = "0" + strDay end if
format_date_to_ecod = strYear + "-" + strMonth + "-" + strDay
end function
private function format_iln_nip_for_ecod(byval strCode, byval nCodeKind) format_iln_nip_for_ecod = ltrim(rtrim(replace(replace(strCode , "-","")," ",""))) dim nLen:nLen = len(format_iln_nip_for_ecod)
if nCodeKind = EDOC_CODE_KIND_NIP then if nLen > EDOC_MAX_NIP_LEN then trans_.message 1002 , 0 , format_iln_nip_for_ecod + ": za długie pole NIP" end if end if
if nCodeKind = EDOC_CODE_KIND_ILN then if nLen > EDOC_MAX_ILN_LEN then trans_.message 1002 , 0 , format_iln_nip_for_ecod + ": za długie pole ILN" end if end if
if not isNumeric(format_iln_nip_for_ecod) then trans_.message 1002 , 0 , format_iln_nip_for_ecod + ": NIP lub ILN powinien zawierac tylko znaki alfanumeryczne" end if
end function
private function format_account_for_ecod(strAccount) format_account_for_ecod = cdata_begin + strAccount + cdata_end end function
private function format_ean_for_ecod(strEAN) format_ean_for_ecod = strEAN end function
private function format_itemcode_for_ecod(strItemCode) format_itemcode_for_ecod = cdata_begin + strItemCode + cdata_end end function
private function format_nr_for_ecod(strNr) format_nr_for_ecod = cdata_begin + strNr + cdata_end end function
private function format_itemname_for_ecod(strItemName) format_itemname_for_ecod = cdata_begin + strItemName + cdata_end end function
private function format_qty_for_ecod(curQty) format_qty_for_ecod = replace(replace(doc_.afc.display.quantity(curQty,"",3),",",".")," ","") end function
private function format_price_for_ecod(curPrice) format_price_for_ecod = replace(replace(doc_.afc.display.money(curPrice,""),",",".")," ","") end function
private function format_taxrate_for_ecod(byval eTaxRate) format_taxrate_for_ecod = cstr(clng(vat2val(eTaxRate) * 100)) end function
private function format_taxcatcode_for_ecod(byval eTaxRate) if eTaxRate = STAWKA_VAT_23_OO then format_taxcatcode_for_ecod = "AE" elseif eTaxRate = STAWKA_VAT_ZWOLNIONY then format_taxcatcode_for_ecod = "E" else format_taxcatcode_for_ecod = "S" end if end function
private function format_taxreftype_for_ecod(byval position) format_taxreftype_for_ecod = "SWW" end function
private function format_taxrefnum_for_ecod(byval position) format_taxrefnum_for_ecod = position.pProdukt.strKodPKWiU end function
private function get_order_num_for_invoice_position(byval position):get_order_num_for_invoice_position = "" if not position.parent.pZamowienie is nothing then get_order_num_for_invoice_position = format_nr_for_ecod(position.parent.pZamowienie.strNrDok) end if end function
private function get_order_date_for_invoice_position(byval position):get_order_date_for_invoice_position = "" if not position.parent.pZamowienie is nothing then get_order_date_for_invoice_position = format_date_to_ecod(position.parent.pZamowienie.dDataWyst) end if end function
private function format_uofm_for_ecod(pUnitOfMeasure):format_uofm_for_ecod=""
if ucase(pUnitOfMeasure.strSkrot) = ucase("szt.") then format_uofm_for_ecod = "PCE" end if
if ucase(pUnitOfMeasure.strSkrot) = ucase("kg") then format_uofm_for_ecod = "KGM" end if
end function
'******************************************* 'EDI
function invoice_to_edi(byval idobj_invoice) dim invoice:set invoice = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ , idobj_invoice) dim stream set stream = prepare_invoice_stream_edi() write_invoice_header_edi invoice , stream write_invoice_parties invoice , stream write_invoice_lines invoice , stream write_invoice_summary invoice , stream finalize_invoice_stream_edi stream set invoice_to_edi = stream end function
private function prepare_invoice_stream_edi() dim stream:set stream = doc_.createstreamobj() stream.write "<?xml version=""1.0"" encoding=""windows-1250""?>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<Invoice>" + vbNewLine set prepare_invoice_stream_edi = stream end function
private function finalize_invoice_stream_edi(byref stream) stream.write "</Invoice>" + vbNewLine end function
private function write_invoice_header_edi(byval invoice , byref stream) stream.write "<InvoiceHeader>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<InvoiceNumber>" + format_nr_edi(invoice.strNrDok) + "</InvoiceNumber>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<InvoiceIssueDate>" + format_date_to_ecod(invoice.dDataSprzed) + "</InvoiceDate>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<TaxPointDate></TaxPointDate>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<InvoiceReference>" if not invoice.pPopSprzed is nothing then stream.write format_nr_edi(invoice.pPopSprzed.strNrDok) end if stream.write "</InvoiceReference>" + vbNewLine stream.write "<InvoiceCurrency>" + invoice.pWaluta.strSkrot + "</InvoiceCurrency>" + vbNewLine stream.write "</InvoiceHeader>" + vbNewLine end function
private function format_nr_edi(strNr) format_nr_edi = cdata_begin + strNr + cdata_end end function
